---
title: "David Redek"
toc: false
about: 
  template: solana
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
---

I hold a Master's degree in Statistics with a strong background in mathematics and experience in academia and industry.

## Experience

**Statistician** | Novo Nordisk A/S | Copenhagen, Denmark | Jan 2024 -- Present

**Research Assistant** | University of Copenhagen | Copenhagen, Denmark | Nov 2021 -- Nov 2023

**Data Scientist** | CGI Inc. | Prague, Czech Republic | July 2020 -- Nov 2020

**Data Engineer** | Woodler, s.r.o. | Brno, Czech Republic | June 2017 -- Sep 2018

## Education

**MSc. in Statistics** | University of Copenhagen | Copenhagen, Denmark | Sep 2021 -- Nov 2023

**Bc. in Mathematics** | Charles University | Prague, Czech Republic | Oct 2017 -- June 2021

<style>
.navbar-brand {
  visibility: hidden !important;
}
</style>
